# Cafeina La Marina

> A relaxing vintage café in La Marina, San Fulgencio (Alicante), Spain. Coffee, tea, cakes and craft cocktails — family-run since 2009.

Cafeina is a cozy nook in La Marina, now under the ownership of Callum and Millie, continuing the legacy of founder Maria (2009). Table service, homemade cakes, craft cocktails, and a warm welcome every day of the week.

## What we serve
- Coffee (Café Latte, Americano, Café con Leche) and loose-leaf teas
- Homemade cakes (lemon drizzle, Victoria sponge, carrot cake, seasonal bakes)
- Savouries (cheddar sausage rolls, ham & cheese toasties, cheese boards)
- Wine & beer (Spanish wines by the glass, cava, Estrella Damm, Mahou)
- Spirits (gin, whiskey, brandy, bourbon, vodka, rum, tequila, cognac)
- Craft cocktails (featured weekly — the Negroni is a house classic)

## Events
- Monthly Wine Tasting nights — a journey through Spanish vineyards
- Fiestas La Marina — authentic Spanish celebrations with music, dancing and food

## Contact
- Phone: +34 711 05 13 58
- Email: hola@cafeinalamarina.com
- Address: Calle Luis de Gongora Sector VI-VII, Local 43-44, 03177 San Fulgencio (Alicante), Spain
- Hours: Mon–Sat 9am till late; Sun 5pm till late
